mapper.select: SELECT student_id FROM student WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT cs.section_id FROM course_section cs JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE c.course_code = #{courseId} AND sm.is_current = 1 AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND (#{division} IS NULL OR cs.section_no = #{division}) ORDER BY cs.section_no FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO enrollment (student_id, section_id, status, enrolled_at) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{sectionId}, 'ENROLLED', SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE course_section cs SET enrolled_count = GREATEST(0, COALESCE(enrolled_count, 0) - 1) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM enrollment e JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id WHERE e.section_id = cs.section_id AND e.student_id = #{studentId} AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' AND c.course_code = #{courseId} )

UPDATE enrollment e SET status = 'DROPPED', dropped_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE e.student_id = #{studentId} AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM course_section cs JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE cs.section_id = e.section_id AND c.course_code = #{courseId} AND sm.is_current = 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN SYSTIMESTAMP BETWEEN rp.start_at AND rp.end_at THEN 'IN_PROGRESS' WHEN SYSTIMESTAMP < rp.start_at THEN 'NOT_STARTED' ELSE 'CLOSED' END AS status, TO_CHAR(CAST(rp.end_at AS DATE), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS deadline, GREATEST(0, CEIL(CAST(rp.end_at AS DATE) - SYSDATE)) AS days_left FROM student s JOIN semester sm ON sm.is_current = 1 JOIN registration_period rp ON rp.semester_id = sm.semester_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND rp.period_type IN ('MAIN', 'ADD_DROP') AND (rp.target_year IS NULL OR rp.target_year = s.year_level) ORDER BY CASE WHEN SYSTIMESTAMP BETWEEN rp.start_at AND rp.end_at THEN 1 WHEN SYSTIMESTAMP < rp.start_at THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, rp.end_at FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

SELECT ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(c.credits), 0) FROM enrollment e JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = e.section_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id WHERE e.student_id = s.student_id AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' AND sm.is_current = 1 ) AS applied, #{maxCredits} AS max_credits, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollment e JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = e.section_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE e.student_id = s.student_id AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' AND sm.is_current = 1 ) AS course_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cart_item ci JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = ci.section_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE ci.student_id = s.student_id AND sm.is_current = 1 ) AS cart_count FROM student s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT c.course_code AS course_id, c.course_name, c.credits AS credit, ( SELECT LISTAGG(ss.day_of_week || ' ' || ss.start_time || '-' || ss.end_time, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ss.day_of_week, ss.start_time) FROM section_schedule ss WHERE ss.section_id = cs.section_id ) AS schedule, TO_CHAR(e.enrolled_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS registered_at, p.name AS professor, ( SELECT LISTAGG(room_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY room_name) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT cr.building || ' ' || cr.room_no AS room_name FROM section_schedule ss JOIN classroom cr ON cr.classroom_id = ss.classroom_id WHERE ss.section_id = cs.section_id ) ) AS room FROM student s JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = s.student_id AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = e.section_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN professor p ON p.professor_id = cs.professor_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND sm.is_current = 1 ORDER BY e.enrolled_at DESC

SELECT c.course_code AS course_id, c.course_name, c.course_type, c.credits AS credit, p.name AS professor, cs.section_no || '분반' AS division, ss.day_of_week, ss.start_time, ss.end_time, cr.building || ' ' || cr.room_no AS room FROM student s JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = s.student_id AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = e.section_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN professor p ON p.professor_id = cs.professor_id JOIN section_schedule ss ON ss.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN classroom cr ON cr.classroom_id = ss.classroom_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND sm.is_current = 1 ORDER BY ss.day_of_week, ss.start_time
